message:
Fix abort signal leaks, topology error suppression, test failures (#4779)

- sseClient.ts: Use named abort handler with removeEventListener cleanup
  after stream completion to prevent listener accumulation (#4772)
- mcp/shared.ts (fetchWithRetry): Move abort listener setup outside try
  block and clean up in finally to prevent leaks across retries (#4772)
- topology.go: Capture and surface upstream errors as partialErrors in
  the response instead of silently discarding them (#4774)
- useActiveUsers.ts: Export __resetForTest() to clear singleton state
  between test runs; fix test timing for circuit breaker and smoothing
  tests that relied on stale cross-test state (#4775)
- useCardRecommendations.test.ts: Fix incorrect assertion — the code
  correctly filters security_issues when already in currentCardTypes (#4775)

Fixes #4772, #4774, #4775

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
